programme.title: Deceived
programme.desc: Corey Jenkins was a dual athlete with a potential pro career in either baseball or football. When the time comes to sign a management agency, Corey is convinced by local agents that they are the only agents that will look out for his true interests - the only agents he can trust. But while everything seems to run smoothly at first, Corey is soon faced with money problems, despite a substantial signing bonus he received when he was drafted. Slow to suspect his slick talking agents, by the time Corey realizes he has been victimized by the very people he trusted, it is too late.

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.desc: Jimmie Atkins was well-liked by everyone in his neighborhood. Days pass and no one had seen or heard from him which was quite uncharacteristic. The APD were called and they discovered that he was murdered inside his own home. Quinn and Vince rush to the scene only to discover that people who you love and hold dearest to your heart, can make it stop beating.

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not
programme.desc: Tyrone Page tries to take the high road while his twin, Jerome, prefers lower alternatives but fate leads them both to life on the dark side. Then, AJ Nelson’s life of rejection and heartache leaves him destitute. With nothing to lose, someone will pay the ultimate price from his pursuit of wealth.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Troubled housewife Carolyn King deserts her family in search of a clean slate, only to find her perfect match in a local convict Bradley Martin. Next, teen mom Angel Glenn risks it all to support her baby. But when she crosses paths with a bad boy, Angel leaves her world of seduction for a life of crime.

programme.title: #Murder
programme.desc: 15-year-old Mikarah Sanders and 16-year-old Matthew DuBois were two typical teenagers in a whirlwind romance. The two were inseparable; when they weren’t together, they were messaging on MySpace. But when a New Year’s Eve in Seattle ends in the mysterious shooting of Mikarah and Matthew, police scour social media to piece together the crime. Their search for answers would reveal a tale of jealousy, rage, and the murder of an innocent teen.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.desc: When a beloved local reporter is gunned down in Oakland, California, his death reverberates throughout the city and his reporting on the activities of a local empowerment group are called into question.

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.desc: Demetrius Robbins was a stand-up husband and father who made it a point to serve his family, until one night where the unthinkable happened. Quinn and Vince go from a crime scene where there is no body, to rapidly piecing together that Demetrius Robbins is the victim in a much larger and horrific crime that they never could have imagined.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: Derrick and Linda Yancey have been together since high school. The young lovers got married soon after graduation and stayed devoted to each other for more than 20 years. But Derrick would become so infatuated with money that it eventually would cost him and Linda everything.

programme.title: Deceived
programme.desc: Tammi McCreary thought she had met the man of her dreams in Eric Perteet. A charismatic and ambitious doctor from Chicago, Eric quickly swept Tammi off her feet. But Eric was not what he seemed to be. Shortly after their wedding, Tammi's new husband is arrested at the local hospital, and she is faced with a string of shocking lies and the knowledge that she is not the only woman who has fallen prey to Eric's deceitful ways.

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not
programme.desc: In Towson, MD young Lewin Powell III is known in his upper-middle class community as the good son. But when years of academic pressure from his parents come to a head, Lewin snaps unleashing hell on his mother. Later, church leaders Christy and Neil Edgar’s strong belief in discipline takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When Felicia Scott’s man demands a child she can’t give him, she dives into a homicidal tailspin to get him exactly what he wants. Then, Victoria Jackson commits the ultimate act of betrayal against one of her own family members, at her dangerously jealous man’s request.

programme.title: #Murder
programme.desc: Siohban Lee was a bubbly teen that you could always find on her phone scrolling through social media or hard at work earning money for college. That is, until she was found shot to death one wintery night in Washington DC. With almost nothing to go on from the scene of the crime, detectives turn to the pages of social media to find out who would want to hurt this beautiful barista. Little did they know, Siohban’s online accounts would lead them straight to her killer.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.desc: Riverside, California is home to thousands of marines, sailors, and their families, but a grisly double-murder of a marine and his wife is the last thing local residents expect to confront.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: Samira Watkins had fallen hard for naval officer, Zachary Littleton. But when Samira inexplicably goes missing, the search to find her would unveil a tightly wound web of secrets and lies. And when this web begins to unravel, it exposes a hidden evil that will tear a family apart.

programme.title: Deceived
programme.desc: Abraham Kennard was a fast-talking pastor with an ambitious real estate investment opportunity. Hundreds of pastors and parishioners from churches across the country were lured by Kennard’s lavish lifestyle and promises of enormous returns. But though the millions poured in, the returns never poured out, revealing this supposed man of God…to be a man of greed.

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not
programme.desc: Family is all that matters to Kim Wolfe until she meets Stacie. As the relationship goes south, Kim finds herself questioning everything, even her sanity. Then, Robert Barnes leads a charmed life with gifts beyond measure but when tragedy strikes, he may find himself standing in the crossfire.

programme.title: For My Man

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.desc: 21-year-old new mother, Sparkle Rai, is found by her boyfriend strangled in their apartment. He instantly becomes the only suspect, but he swears he didn’t do it. Quinn and Velazquez investigate and uncover a surprising new suspect from Sparkle’s past.

programme.title: #Murder
programme.desc: 14-year-old Shaniesha Forbes, was your typical American teenager. If she wasn’t hanging out with family or friends, she was busy scrolling through facebook, planning her next event on her busy social calendar. But when Shaniesha failed to come home from school or answer her phone in January of 2013, her mother knew something was terribly wrong. The search for the truth would expose the dark side of social media.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.desc: A Civil Rights landmark and the birthplace of rock ‘n roll, Memphis, Tennessee is the quintessential American South. When a beloved local NBA star is found shot to death in the woods, the city bands together to avenge their fallen hero.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: Samira Watkins had fallen hard for naval officer, Zachary Littleton. But when Samira inexplicably goes missing, the search to find her would unveil a tightly wound web of secrets and lies. And when this web begins to unravel, it exposes a hidden evil that will tear a family apart.

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.desc: Mark Schaller was new to the Atlanta area. While out one night in early October 2002, Mark began chatting with another patron at a bar. As they dig deeper and deeper into who committed this heinous crime, they soon realize that this was no personal attack and that the killer could be linked to something far greater.

programme.title: Deceived

But unbeknownst to Rose, her smooth talking lothario has been carefully orchestrating his control over her finances, and when Francois disappears, it isn't just her money that he's taken.

programme.title: For My Man

programme.title: #Murder

programme.title: Nature's Reboot
programme.desc: A revolution in genetic technology could help save endangered species from the brink of extinction or even bring back the ones we've lost. Cloning and gene editing might offer a lifeline to many species struggling to survive on a planet severely altered by human activities and climate change. Some conservationists now ask: Is nature's 3.6 billion-year-old code of life in need of a reboot?

programme.title: Marshall Fire
programme.desc: Scripps News puts the 2021 Marshall Fire into focus. The Colorado wildfire, which destroyed more than 1,000 homes and structures in Boulder County, became the most destructive wildfire in state history. More than two years later, many outside Denver are still rebuilding what they lost.

programme.title: Sikh Temple Shooting
programme.desc: Scripps News revisits the the Sikh Temple in Wisconsin in the community of Oak Creek, a site of a tragic shooting on August 5, 2012, where seven worshipers lost their lives to an act fueled by hate and extremism. More than a decade later, we delve into the community's journey of healing, resilience, and the power of forgiveness.

programme.title: Puerto Rico's Power Crisis
programme.desc: What's behind the rampant blackouts in Puerto Rico leaving millions of Americans in the dark?

programme.title: Post-Trauma
programme.desc: Scripps News' Joey Maiocco goes on a personal journey to treat his post-traumatic stress and help other war veterans find their own treatment.

programme.title: Ukraine's Women Warriors
programme.desc: Reported from inside Ukraine. The call to fight for freedom is being answered by Ukrainian women, showcasing their strength and bravery.

programme.title: Weighing The Costs
programme.desc: Amid a surge in demand for weight loss drugs, concerns about safety are growing. Are these drugs effective? Are they safe?

programme.title: Scripps News Showcase: Made In Boise
programme.desc: Four women find purpose carrying babies for strangers in the conservative heartland of Boise, Idaho - the unregulated and unofficial `surrogacy capital' of the United States - and encounter unexpected complexities along the way.

programme.title: Local Love
programme.desc: Ashley is young, fun and single in Louisville, but can’t seem to find the right guy – yet. Enter three local singles to show her the town with a trip to the batting cages, a game of tennis and a lesson in blowing glass.

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?
programme.desc: Why is Frank Nicotero sumo wrestling at a farmer's market? Find out as he quizzes Queen City locals about the wildest, wackiest news stories as they try for cash prizes.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: In a serene community, a beloved doctor is bludgeoned in her own home. Investigators uncover a conspiracy that rocks the close-knit neighborhood to its core​​.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: Six people are slain in a home in a quiet Iowa town. One person survives a gunshot to the head and claims to have no memory of the incident. The tragedy and eventual trial shred the social fabric of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Sports Town Stories
programme.desc: Whether it's a wrestling star training through grief, champion rollerskaters challenged on the world stage, or a cycling team pushing through obstacles, Iowans don't back down when the going gets tough.

programme.title: The Lost Children of Carlisle
programme.desc: A powerful look at the history of Native American boarding schools as told through the stories of tribal members and their surviving family members, who endured an educational system founded on the concept “Kill the Indian in him, and save the man.”

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.desc: Daniel Johnson juggles three jobs and is a single father to three kids. Kinga meets with Daniel in Pittsburgh, PA to help him ‘clock out’, reconnect with nature, and experience some quality “me time.”

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.desc: Near the foothills of the Blue Ridge Mountains, go for a spin on the track and on the dance floor. Order a tiny coffee and get cozy in a tiny house. Chat up alpacas and introduce yourself to the granddaughter of a legendary four-legged athlete. It’s all possible in Greer, South Carolina.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: A man vanishes from a boarding house in 1988. The fight to find him uncovers one of the most shocking cases in Sacramento history and the surprising revelation of a grandmotherly-looking serial killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: David suffered from a blood disorder and hasn’t had a full set of teeth since he was 12. Heather struggles with a rare genetic condition that put her in dentures in her 20s. Can the FIXT team write the final chapter in their health journeys?

programme.title: Lost Innocence: The Tragedy of Harmony Montgomery
programme.desc: A police investigation into a missing seven-year-old girl in Manchester, New Hampshire reveals harrowing details that shock the state. But even more disturbing is the discovery that the tragic outcome could have been avoided.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.desc: A resilient family bands together after their mother is tragically murdered by her husband. Ryan and Justin help to memorialize her legacy by purchasing a headstone for her gravesite.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Chef Nissa'a Stallworth and Chef Joey Hilty test their limits as they work to put a dinner twist on the most important meal of the day.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.desc: Go on a kayak adventure, grab some unique eats, and zipline your heart out on a trip to this happening city on the Monongahela river.

programme.title: Hour Long Docs List
programme.desc: A playlist of hour long VL Originals

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: Single father Kendal Fenwick is the 295th homicide in Baltimore in 2015. Family and investigators wonder whether his efforts to curb drugs and violence in his neighborhood made him a target. Or is it something else entirely?

programme.title: Lost Innocence: The Tragedy of Harmony Montgomery
programme.desc: A police investigation into a missing seven-year-old girl in Manchester, New Hampshire reveals harrowing details that shock the state. But even more disturbing is the discovery that the tragic outcome could have been avoided.

programme.title: What's On The Menu?
programme.desc: Sourcing high-quality, fresh ingredients can be a challenge in an urban area like Pittsburgh. Meet chefs and restaurant owners who are going the extra mile to serve up fresh farm-to-table cuisine.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.desc: Can Chef Peter Kusiw of La Provence trip up Chef Nathanial Zimet of Boucherie with his secret sauce? Maybe yes, maybe no, but either way the mystery guest judge will make you question what you see.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Fire up the grill and pour a cold one. Chefs Carleen King and Neil Blazin are facing off in a Summer Cookout cook-off. Can our chefs keep their cool? Or will they melt down in the summer heat?

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown
programme.desc: Rob takes on ocean conservation and masters sculling, plus proves he’s got the skills to perform on Boston’s bluest stage with some world-famous performers.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.desc: Glenda Macatangay has conquered her career and being a single mom to four kids. But when it comes to being comfortable in the outdoors, she isn’t as confident. Kinga meets up with Glenda in Sacramento, CA to introduce her to the wonders of the wilderness.

programme.title: Americas Most Delish
programme.desc: Celebrate some of the Midwest's holiday favorites. Where scotcheroos take center stage, snicker salads delight, and the pink stuff surprises the pallet.

programme.title: My Perfect Day
programme.desc: Kar is a selfless soul known for his unwavering commitment to the unhoused in his community. It's Kar's turn to have some good old-fashioned fun.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.desc: Ed and Day head to Bloomfield for a rousing game of dek hockey, an education in cheese, and an intro to glass art. The guys finish their day at a “slappers and bangers” party.

programme.title: Show Me Milwaukee
programme.desc: What’s the best way to experience Milwaukee? By boat! Greg gets a kayaking tour from the founder of Support Local MKE, Marleigh Petras, who shows him all the best spots to hit along the Menomonee River.

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque
programme.desc: MMA champion Michelle Waterson-Gomez takes Amanda on a high-energy day in Albuquerque. From throwing punches inside the octagon to dancing up high on aerial silks, this dynamic duo never seems to break a sweat.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: A fugitive escapes through the ceiling. A man plows his car into the police station. These shocking stories prove cops don't even have to leave the building to encounter the unpredictable.

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Mikey’s getting married soon and the clock is ticking to get his teeth picture-perfect. Lynn’s embarrassed by the color of her teeth and won’t wait another moment for a white smile. Can the FIXT team get the work done in time?

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Danny’s a family man now and needs to upgrade his smile, damaged by past drug use. But he’s been burned by dentists before. Tattoo artist Craig claims that no one’s been able to give him teeth he won’t break. Will their faith in dentists be restored?

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: In a serene community, a beloved doctor is bludgeoned in her own home. Investigators uncover a conspiracy that rocks the close-knit neighborhood to its core​​.

programme.title: WXII Local News
programme.desc: Get the latest news and weather from WXII.

programme.title: Hour Long Docs List
programme.desc: A playlist of hour long VL Originals

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge
programme.desc: Makers, crafters and artists square off to create the most iconic art piece that best represents their city. From glass-blowers and chalk artists to metalsmiths and tattooers, see who Host Ashley Adams and the judges will crown the victor.

programme.title: Maker Nation
programme.desc: Maker Nation

programme.title: Only In
programme.desc: Every city has its own local flavor, culture and vibe. Only In celebrates communities across America and the people, activities and history that make each place unique. From must-try activities to hidden gems and hotspots, to dedicated changemakers, these stories are sure to inspire a deeper love and appreciation for your hometown and beyond.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot
programme.desc: No one knows a city like the locals who live there. This series taps into the insider knowledge of notable figures including musicians, athletes, chefs, artists, influencers, and others who share their best spots to hit up in the city.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.desc: Comedians, podcasters and craft beer enthusiasts Ed Bailey and Day Bracey explore hot spots, hidden gems and the best places to grab a cold brew in the 'Burgh.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: In “Free Spirit,” award-winning bartender and host Kate Gerwin takes to the road and meets people in their workplaces and their favorite watering holes.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Watch things heat up in the kitchen as two local chefs go head-to-head to create a three-course meal utilizing ingredients sourced from one of the city’s unique marketplaces.

programme.title: My Amazing Cheap Date
programme.desc: Host and comedic actor Amy Brassette McKeon challenges two sets of couples to pass a good time on a dime in their city. Find out which couple will experience the most amazing date for under fifty bucks.

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Danny’s a family man now and needs to upgrade his smile, damaged by past drug use. But he’s been burned by dentists before. Tattoo artist Craig claims that no one’s been able to give him teeth he won’t break. Will their faith in dentists be restored?

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: In a serene community, a beloved doctor is bludgeoned in her own home. Investigators uncover a conspiracy that rocks the close-knit neighborhood to its core​​.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.desc: Join New Hampshire-based band Recycled Percussion as they perform acts of kindness in their community, and across the country. In each episode, you'll witness the great lengths and hilarious things they're willing to do in the name of kindness.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown
programme.desc: Join host Rob Mariano, also known as Boston Rob from the Survivor series, as he explores the best of Beantown from classic institutions to new local gems.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.desc: Experience serious vacation vibes and discover some of the most special corners of America on this guided tour of must-visit cities.

programme.title: Ballin' in Baltimore
programme.desc: Join WNBA player and Olympian Angel McCoughtry as she shows us the people and places that put Baltimore on the map. From sailing the Chesapeake, to sampling street foods, McCoughtry pulls back the curtain on what makes the Charm City so special.

programme.title: Nature's Reboot
programme.desc: A revolution in genetic technology could help save endangered species from the brink of extinction or even bring back the ones we've lost. Cloning and gene editing might offer a lifeline to many species struggling to survive on a planet severely altered by human activities and climate change. Some conservationists now ask: Is nature's 3.6 billion-year-old code of life in need of a reboot?

programme.title: Marshall Fire
programme.desc: Scripps News puts the 2021 Marshall Fire into focus. The Colorado wildfire, which destroyed more than 1,000 homes and structures in Boulder County, became the most destructive wildfire in state history. More than two years later, many outside Denver are still rebuilding what they lost.

programme.title: Sikh Temple Shooting
programme.desc: Scripps News revisits the the Sikh Temple in Wisconsin in the community of Oak Creek, a site of a tragic shooting on August 5, 2012, where seven worshipers lost their lives to an act fueled by hate and extremism. More than a decade later, we delve into the community's journey of healing, resilience, and the power of forgiveness.

programme.title: Ukraine's Women Warriors
programme.desc: Reported from inside Ukraine. The call to fight for freedom is being answered by Ukrainian women, showcasing their strength and bravery.

programme.title: Weighing The Costs
programme.desc: Amid a surge in demand for weight loss drugs, concerns about safety are growing. Are these drugs effective? Are they safe?

programme.title: Scripps News Showcase: Made In Boise
programme.desc: Four women find purpose carrying babies for strangers in the conservative heartland of Boise, Idaho - the unregulated and unofficial `surrogacy capital' of the United States - and encounter unexpected complexities along the way.
